details.title: Neon Square: Resurgence
details.description:
Your controls are all out of whack! You'll have to survive levels by making do with what you've got! If you can avoid death long enough, all your controls will be restored to working order. Hey, better late than never, they say. Can you find the cause of this mayhem and put a stop to it?
Created for Game Off 2022 with the theme cliché.

game.title: Shot In The Dark
game.short_text: When your only light source... is your gun.

details.title: Shot In The Dark
details.description:
**NOTE** While the browser build is perfectly playable and enjoyable, we recommend the downloadable version if you'd like to play the game with sharper graphics, superior lighting, 3D soundscapes, and better support when playing with a controller.


WHERE'S SAMMY?
Finally, you have a lead on Sammy's whereabouts. Of course the clues pointed to a spooky, abandoned mansion - how cliché. But whatever, you have no choice. Can you traverse the darkness and get your beloved Sammy back?

 GAMEPLAY  
Light may be scarce in the mansion, but you have bullets to spare. Shoot to light up the scene and take in your surroundings.  You will have to maneuver, jump, and climb the dilapidated halls, solve puzzles, and... a few other surprises.  Complete each room by reaching the green door. Your bullets refresh every level.

CONTROLS

MOVE: Left Stick or WASDLOOK: Right Stick or MouseJUMP: South Button or Space BarINTERACT: West Button or E KeySHOOT: Right Trigger or Left ClickAIM: Left Trigger or Right ClickPAUSE: Start or Enter
**NOTE** The default setting for look sensitivity on mouse and keyboard is too high for a lot of players. This can be adjusted in the pause menu.


CREDITS
Shot in the Dark was created for GAME OFF 2022 by Cave Tower Studios, a two-person game dev team based in Los Angeles, California, consisting of Patrick Fye and Matt Tye. 
Many thanks to our wonderful voice actor, Jonathan Yglesias.
And thank you to our play testers: Kyle Cobos, Krissy Tye, Kenny Tye, and Alyssa Fye.


 If you do prefer to use a controller, make sure you press start at the menu screen to start the game rather than enter on your keyboard. This will allow the proper graphics and look sensitivities to be loaded.

game.title: Super Monkey's Paw
game.short_text: A retro collect'em up!

details.title: Super Monkey's Paw
details.description:
Super Monkey's Paw is a retro collect'em up that doesn't skimp on story!
Play as a prince desperate to collect all the things a princess could ever want and fulfill your deepest wish: to keep the princess safe from harm!
Controls for web
WASD or ARROWS to move. Some mouse interaction required for menus.
Click the gear icon while playing to activate/deactivate the mobile control stick.
Controls for mobile
Use the on-screen joystick. Some interaction required for menus.








Super Monkey's Paw is a love letter to some of my favorite games that have inspired me over the years. I love pixel art and development restrictions of old consoles like the GameBoy and SNES.
Please enjoy, and thank's for checking it out. Post that high score and time if you get to the end!
Credits

Artwork | Jonathan Schmidt | jonartist.com
Artwork | Amanda Berry
Story | Angela Defendini | metafoxical.com
Music | CactusBear | GameDevMarket
Submitted for the 2022 GitHub Game Off (Repository)

game.title: Decipherism
game.short_text: A puzzle game where you solve the encoding machine ciphers

details.title: Decipherism
details.description:
> Check out my new game!Overview
A puzzle game where you solve the encoding machine ciphers. 
The key features are:
 
Puzzles that can be solved in more than one way
Complex cross-level secrets
A stylish in-game manual
Immersive interface
Custom levels support + levels editor
This game is a Game Off 2022 game jam submission.
 
The game jam theme is cliche. Therefore, you're hacking a Penth Hexagon using some retro-style hacking device with bright green consoles. 
Estimated game play time: 2-5 hours, depending on whether you're willing to clear the bonus content or not.
Note: this game performs better in Chrome than in Firefox. Also, you can't run custom levels in browser, use download a game executable for that.
How to play
The in-game manual could be enough for some players, but it leaves a few aspects undefined on purpose. If you don't want to fill the gaps on your own, here is a short overview about how this game is intended to be played. In a sense, it is a spoiler.
Every level (called component) consists of some encoding machine. It turns the text input into some encoded output. For instance, you run it with "hello" and get "ohell" as an output.
To clear a level, you need to decipher the access keywords (encoded keywords). You do that by typing the non-encoded (original) keyword into the input text field.
How would you know what to type in there? This is an actual gameplay: you need to figure it out on your own. You have an encoder simulation device at your disposal. It can encode any input using the same algorithm that was used to encode the keywords. The encoded keywords are listed in the right section of the interface. You can try to backtrack their transformations individually.
The text input is controlled as you would expect it: type some letters in, remove text with backspace, move the text cursor with arrows. Enter runs the simulation with the current input value. Space pauses the simulation. Tab toggles between the normal and terminal modes. Escape always works as a "go back" button.
You unlock new terminal features with your game progress.
The progress is saved automatically.
Creating and running custom levels
The custom levels feature is only available in the desktop builds of the game (i.e. not in browser).
Related instructions:
Creating a custom levelRunning a custom level
Known issues
You need an English layout to type anything inThe game may look weird on some unsupported resolutionsSystem UI scaling may break the game window
Credits
There is no "credits" screen anywhere in the game, please see CREDITS file for license-related information. Game source repository can be found at github.com/quasilyte/decipherism-game.

details.title: In the Cards
details.description:
You have a deck of tarot cards and have to place the cards on the board one by one to reach the target. By grabbing the target you slowly level up and can pick new powers to add to your cards.
You can keep going as long as you can reach the target in five moves or less and the board isn't completely filled.
Claim your spot on the online leaderboards and take on the daily challenge which presents the exact same scenario for every player each day.

game.title: Roses Are Red
game.short_text: Play as Mother Nature & fill the world with flowers in this relaxing experience.

details.title: Roses Are Red
details.description:
🎮 Roses Are Red
🌹 Play as Mother Nature & fill the world with flowers in this relaxing experience.
 
 Make flowers grow wherever you walk
 Enjoy a serene experience, suited for everyone
 Listen to the original soundtrack, featuring soprano vocals
 Complete five areas, each with their own flower type
 Discover the five hidden jasmine flowers
 
This is my submission for Game Off 2022, the theme being cliché.
 

👀 Behind The Scenes
🎨 I went for a wholesome & relaxing experience carried by the art style & music. It’s an artgame with gameplay that is very minimalistic by design, so non-gamers might actually like it more than experienced gamers.
 
🖋️ See the links below for three devlogs in which I explain the behind the scenes of creating this game: the art design, the sound design, and finally a postmortem with what I learned from creating the game.
 
💬 Also thanks a lot for all the comments I got on the game jam page. Feedback like this is very important for personal improvement. Thanks as well for the amazing 3th place in the category Audio Design, you can read all about how I created the music in the devlog.

👤 Credits

Concept, Art, Coding, Music - Tijmen MatthysVocals - Valerie De KempeLyrics - Emily Dickinson (from the poem “Mother Nature”)

Thanks for playing!💬 Comment below to share your thoughts & suggestions.🎮 Check out my other games & devlogs

🎨 Check out my other projects

Have a nice life ❤️~ Tijmen

game.title: Ezcort Mission
game.short_text: Follow your loyal hound in search of another survivor in this entry to Game Off 2022

details.title: Ezcort Mission
details.description:
Looks like your loyal hound, Rover, has picked up the scent of another survivor in this zombie-infested, post-apocalyptic wasteland. Keep him safe and make sure he doesn't stray too far while you escort him on the trail for more clues... Original, right? 
We've included a bunch of references to other gaming clichés, so listen out for them! Let us know which is your favorite and how many you catch while playing
Please enjoy our entry to  Game Off 2022, this year's theme was: Cliché.

WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot, R to reload, hold Shift to Sprint, F to toggle fullscreen, X to restart at last checkpoint
⚠️ 🙈 Warning: This game involves shooting zombies, so it contains animated violence and gore and is NOT appropriate for all ages.

🌐 Web version: Firefox seems to show better performance than Chrome for this game, if you have stuttering audio please use the download version instead because it is more performant than running in the browser.
🙏 If the game freezes in the browser, this is a bug! Before refreshing the page please open the browser console and copy/screenshot the red coloured Javascript error log and send it to us so that we can find and fix the issue!

---
Post-deadline game update 2022-12-02: almost all the comments on the game mentioned the player getting stuck in the dog and can't get out, then having to close the game and restart. This was a game breaking bug caused by a typo in the collision logic so today we have pushed a fix for this ed58b04 and two related fixes:
7543d3c If the player character gets stuck in a wall/dog e.g. due to buggy rotation, move it outsideee4afc2 You can now press X to restart at the last checkpoint, so that if there are more bugs, you can restart from there instead of having to start the whole game again
Publishing this here for openness and transparency because this change was made the day after the deadline passed and we want to keep our participation in the game jam fair to everyone else.
---
The team:
Rowan Lindeque — graphics and designTristan Le Roux — voice over and testingSiôn Le Roux — programmingPéter Kertész — programming
This game was written in Go using the Ebitengine library. Map designed using ldTK and sprite animations using Aseprite. Music by Marika Schanz.
Get the source code on GitHub and look at the development progress, how we got here day-by-day: Twitter devlog.
Some highlights from the development process:
Day 2:Day 17:Day 30:

Created for Github's Game off 2022  --- Cliche: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
# QA

How to start:

Press the button next to the computer to begin.

I can't press buttons:

Make sure you are not holding a item, place it back and then try again.

How do I get rid of items:
Some items can be trashed on the trash. Else you are forced to use them.
Power just went out, what do I do:
You can turn it on at the generator (next to where you spawn), by holding the lever down

E to pickup / place itemsMouse1 to use usable itemsMouse2 to zoomShift to runWASD to moveMouse to look aroundESC to open options menu

Have fun!

game.title: Gnop
game.short_text: A new point of view on Pong, a cliche video game.

details.title: Gnop
details.description:
Submission for the Game Off 2022
Controls
Note: Mouse is disabled in this game, only arrow keys, W,S, SPACE, enter and ESC work!
Use UP / DOWN or W / S to move the ball. And SPACE to enter time laps mode.
    The collectible power ups refill your time laps tank. Use enter to accept a UI selection.
Gameplay
In Gnop you take control of a tennis ball trying to hit the moving bats at the left and right border of the screen. For each collision with a bat you get 1 point.
When you enter the area behind the bats, the game is over. You can, however, hit the bottom and top areas of the court.
Theme
Pong is a cliché itself as it "is overused and betrays a lack of original thought", e.g. by having multiple tutorials for game development using Pong and projects in general.
That's why we decided to create a game similar to Pong, but with a new point of view.CredtisProgramming Alexander DittmannGlenn Dittmann Pixel ArtGlenn Dittmann Font DesignChevy Ray Sound DesignLucas MilzkottOve Melaa  
Enjoy and try beating the high score!

moreInfo.Author: Glennorous
moreInfo.Tags: cliche, game-off-2022, pong

game.title: 🌿 Bet the Farm 🌿
game.short_text: A casual farming game wherein you must win a bet to rescue your inheritance from your greedy uncle

details.title: 🌿 Bet the Farm 🌿
details.description:
Audio Engine: FMOD Studio by Firelight Technologies Pty Ltd.
In Bet the farm you take on the role of Yara's only child. Yara has left you her farming empire, but there’s a slight snag: your greedy uncle owns half the company. He’s only willing to sell if you can win a bet and prove you’ve mastered the ins and outs of running a farm in four years. Win the bet, fulfill Yara’s dying wish, and claim your rightful inheritance. Or lose the bet and, with it, your mother’s farm… 
🏁 In this game, you will:

Plow acres & grow your own crops 🌽Build animal pens & settle livestock 🐖Sell the resources you grow to earn coins 💰Grow and expand your farm 📈


Your friend, Perry, will gladly help you to achieve your goals.


So give it your all, win the bet, and inherit your mom’s farms! You can make her proud.
If you run into audio issues, refresh or download the windows build!

Changelog:
**Additions**- Added a new, fully interactive tutorial- Added the ability to sell more than one item at once- Added brand new notification toasts, displaying quest updates and acquired resources- Added a small sentence to item collection messages indicating whether it can currently being sold in the shop- Added an option to instantly discard a card, instead of opening the confirmation panel and waiting for the animation to finish- Added restart buttons to both the game-over and game-won screens- Added a new information panel that appears when hovering over a tile, which displays the following stats:1. Empty Base Tile: the type of the tile (Mountain, Forest, etc.)2. Empty Acre: the type of the tile and an info that the acre is empty3. Empty Pen: the type of the tile and an info that the pen is empty4. Seed: the final product of the seed and its amount and when it is harvested5. Animal: the final product of the animal and when it is obtained- Added a splash screen- Added a loading screen, loading FMOD banks asynchronously on game start- Added Font Icon Assets for all resources, animals, and buildings- Added Blur VFX to most menus- Added settings and a new settings menu to the main menu:1. Volume: Changes the volume to 10%-100%2. Mute: Sets the volume to 0%3. Discard Instantly: Allows discarding cards without confirmation (see above)4. Show Tutorial: Should the tutorial be shown when entering a new game?5. Show Will: Should the will menu be shown before a new game?**Changes**- Made many, many UI changes- The quest menu now displays all five quest goals, instead of just the first four quest goals- Removed annoying notifications when selling items- The initial letter now displays the total accumulated goal of all three tasks, instead of just the last goal of all three tasks- The card descriptions in the card inspector now contain much more information about the crops- The will letters now mention that there is a time limit of four years- Renamed the button "Shop" to "Market" like it is called in the shop menu itself- Renamed the heading "Quests" to "Tasks" like called in the will letter- Renamed the old tutorial to "Help" and included it as an additional help source- Reworked the game over and game won panels- Cameras now use black and brown skyboxes for better visuals on HD+ screens- Replaced all Unity-default fonts- Menus are now more screen-responsive- The desktop executable now has an icon**Fixes**- Fixed audio issues in WebGL- Fixed the notorious bug, where the hand card size would decrease randomly, instead of always redrawing five cards at the start of a new turn- Fixed the card inspector menu layout being messed up when inspecting a card- Fixed a bug where the time manager would randomly get stuck- Fixed a bug where the time manager would not end the turn- Fixed a bug where the farm ambience sound would still play when returning to the main menu- Fixed a bug where entering any shop would not trigger the shop door sound- Fixed a bug where the card inspector would use an acre background for an animal pen card- Fixed a bug where the quest goals in the detailed quest menu would show the placeholder "Step N completed" for all completed goals- Fixed a bug where the card inspector would not display an animal pen background for animals- Fixed a visual inconsistency where the animal pen text in the card inspector would enter a new line- Fixed a bug where the time manager would always display the summer icon, no matter the season- Fixed some typos

game.title: Glutton for Punishment
game.short_text: A game made for GitHub Game Jam 2022 with the theme of 'Cliché'

details.title: Glutton for Punishment
details.description:
Play as a lowly reaper forced to clean up the unworldly and neglected parts of the world where once beautiful beings have mutated and transformed into disgusting beasts. These beasts must be slain and fragments of their souls must be collected and given to the bone man. Collecting enough soul fragments will allow a punishment to be selected that will benefit thee. Thus becoming a glutton for the punishment.
The bone man demands a quota and it must be met. Failing to do so with result in termination. Succeeding will reward you with more abilities.

game.title: Shoot Into The Void
game.short_text: One last shot in the dark, can you survive it?

details.title: Shoot Into The Void
details.description:
Surrounded, outnumbered, limited power to fend off attacks. You divert all your power to the weapons systems - how good is your shot in the dark? 
Guide your missile to take out as much enemies as you can!Controls
WASD/Arrow keys - move player within bounding circle
Mouse - aim player/guide missile
Left click - fire missile
G key - toggle glow effect (for performance)

Slow Performance?
Try disabling the Glow effect by pressing the G key during the game.
We've mostly developed and tested this game with Google Chrome, and encourage you to use it. We've had instances where the game ran at < 10 FPS per seconds. Try enabling these two settings in your browser:
1.  Enable hardware acceleration in settings. In chrome://settings/ , ensure "Use hardware acceleration when available" is turned on.

2. Use multiple GPU threads. In  chrome://flags/, enable the "Enables Display Compositor to use a new gpu thread" flag.
CreditsProgramminghsaka, gameboymarcusArtKenney's Simple Space - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/simple-spaceMusicTitle screen - Eon - Ambient Sci Fi Music

game.title: MEMES DIE TOO
game.short_text: Post memes on social networks until you get reknown enough to join the infamous Memelords and Memeladies Society.

details.title: MEMES DIE TOO
details.description:
MEMES DIE TOO
Hello memer…
To join the Memelords and Memeladies Society, you will create a new account on THE NETWORK™. You will post one meme per day until one of your memes reaches one thousand shares. You could even get some fans along the way!
But be careful on the internet... some THE NETWORK™ users are also present on FaithBlog ©. If they repost your meme there, we will cringe  very fast and your meme will be considered cliché!
Good luck, memer.

FEATURES
😎 Choose memes from your very personal collection
💅 Post them and watch them spread through THE NETWORK ™
🤩 Acquire fans and give them tasks to help you join the 💀 Society


Entry to GAME OFF 2022
This one-month long jam was hosted by Github during November 2022. The theme was "cliché".https://itch.io/jam/game-off-2022
Team
There's only me! I am a professional-and-currently-looking-for-a-job game designer from France. If you are looking for someone in this position and like my game, please reach out!

Known issues 
- Audio can break (be careful for your ears)
- At high scores, the game can stutter
- Linux OS can be incompatible with this WebGL build :/

Community
Wow, you read the description until here! Congratulations! If you liked the game and want to join the memers community, head to https://discord.gg/t6VTusWMfV. Clicking this link is an alternate way to win the game.

resultData.title: The Adventures of the Heroic Fox

game.title: The Adventures of the Heroic Fox
game.short_text: Help the heroic fox rescue the missing princess!

details.title: The Adventures of the Heroic Fox
details.description:
The heroic fox 🦊 invited YOU, his trusty ol' squire 🐭, for a new adventure: to find the missing princess. Rearrange his plans to make sure you both survive the battles that await you.

⚔️ Gameplay Description
Turn-based strategy game where you don't get to pick the actions you take but have to make do with what the hero provides you with. He can be quite stubborn so you only have a few suggestions to give him before his ego gets hurt which makes him more vulnerable to attacks. But if you leave his perfect plan untouched (as in encouraging it), his ego will get boosted which has its own benefits.
🍓 Game Jam
This game was made for Game Off 2022 in a month. The theme was cliché. To play the original jam version, download one of the files titled Jam Version. In spirit of the jam, here is a link to the source code.
❗ Tips/Rules
Preferably play downloaded version instead of browser oneChrome version isn't stableFullscreen recommendedWhenever you swap actions the hero loses an ego pointWhen you spend all of the hero's ego points, he will be so distraught he takes double damageIf you leave the hero's plan untouched you gain an ego point and a bonus action for next turn
🎮 Controls
Mouse + Left Click - Almost everything[U] - Undo last swap from the current turn[P] - Pause mid battle (battle speed is changeable from there)[F] - Toggle fullscreen[Esc] - Exit fullscreen
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Credits
Design, Programming & Writing - Krasimir Balchev  a.k.a. krasi0707Design & Art - poopie
Music - Jaedan Calladine Sound Effects - ego down/whimper, action poof, Damien Combe/Nox Sound Design (everything else)

game.title: KittInn: GameOff 2022
game.short_text: A cozy management sim where you run a hotel for cats

details.title: KittInn: GameOff 2022
details.description:
This is my entry for Game Off 2022! The theme this year was Cliche, and my game is inspired by the "crazy cat lady" cliche.
In KittInn, you play as Bea, a woman who discovers a mysterious cat in her house who convinces her to open a hotel for cats in her spare room. Decorate your hotel, welcome guests, and make money in this cozy management sim. You can even pet the cats!
I'm continuing to work on this game and am adding mechanics such as quests, cooking treats, and exploring the town Bea lives in, so I'd love it if you could leave some feedback on KittInn and let me know what features you'd like to see in the full version of the game!

Overview
Agent no. 6 is a first person shooter straight from the 90's that combines horror with action.  
As a secret agent, it is your job to infiltrate the base of a terrorist group using a different arsenal of weapons. However, The game takes a quick turn when things aren't what they are supposed to be.  

Full game
I want to thank everybody for the feedback and support. A full game is in development and is coming along nicely. See more at Full Game. I've just released the demo. You can download it for free on Steam. I should note that the demo doesn't contain any horror elements, which are (of course) present in the full game.   
You can also Wishlist the full game on Steam!

game.title: We're in the same boat
game.short_text: The classic crossing the river riddle with a twist

details.title: We're in the same boat
details.description:
"A river crossing puzzle is a type of puzzle in which the object is to carry items from one river bank to another, usually in the fewest trips. The difficulty of the puzzle may arise from restrictions on which or how many items can be transported at the same time, or which or how many items may be safely left together." 
 - Wikipedia

A bunch of animals and other stuff will have to work together sharing a boat to achieve a common goal, getting to the other side of the river. You'll have to make sure not to put them in a situation where they won't be able to control themselves...

Controls
Just drag whatever you want to move and drop it wherever you want it to be. Drag characters from an island to the boat, drag the boat to another island and then drag the characters to the new island. Easy, right?


Credits
Damaca : Gameplay programmerAlpuerro : UI ProgrammerVito : ArtistRamil: Music and SFX


Made for the Game Off 2022 Game Jam. The theme was "cliché".

details.title: Cliche Hunter
details.description:
A game made in 30 days for the Game Off game jam.

Controls:
WASD or arrows to MoveSpace to Jump E to Activate Left Mouse Button / Enter to attack
Fullscreen:
Use the blue Fullscreen button to enable full-screen.


Gameplay:
The game contains 25 gaming cliches to be found, some very obvious and impossible to miss, others that might require unconventional gameplay to achieve (hint: Check the achievements screen to see where you can unlock specific achievements/cliches).
Can you find all 25 gaming cliches? Only one way to find out! 
Good luck on your journey Hero!
We would love to hear your thoughts on our Jam game so don't forget to leave a comment : )

It's basically like a mash-up between Flappy Bird and Starfox except you can only see an area "lit up by sound".
-CONTROLS-
WASD/Arrow keys OR Gamepad Left JoystickSpacebar OR Gamepad "A" ButtonEnter or Start to PauseEscape to quit (Windows build)
-ABOUT-
This game was made for the  game jam using Unity. The theme of the game jam is "Cliché". I originally was going to make a game that contained a bunch of mini games that each had their own cliché, the first mini game I was working on was about "bad eggs" but the next game was about being blind as a bat. Originally, this game was 2D, but I decided to make this thing in 3D and loving the mechanic, I ended up putting all my attention into making the game solely about a bat that travels through a cave using echo-location.

game.title: Literally
game.short_text: A fun little game about taking clichés literally. Made for GameOff 2022 Game Jam.

details.title: Literally
details.description:
Version 1.2:
Added audioMinor difficulty adjustments
Controls:
WASD - LocomotionSpace Bar - JumpLeft Mouse Button - Left Hand ActionRight Mouse Button - Right Hand ActionEscape - Pause Menu
To quit the game, just use ALT + F4.

The level icons in the main menu weren't made by me, instead they were drawn by another user: https://itch.io/profile/papsuSimply unzip (extract) the downloaded .zip file, and run Literally.exe inside that extracted folder.
